overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand medieval dining hall at night, illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students sit at long wooden tables beneath towering gothic arches and tall windows, with a starry night sky visible through the stained glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candle illumination

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the grand hall from a fixed position near the entrance, taking in the candlelit interior

entered.detail: thousands of lit candles suspended in mid-air throughout the ceiling space, flickering gently
rows of lengthy dining tables filled with seated figures and lit candelabras
massive cylindrical stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall arched stained glass windows revealing a starry night sky
large stone hearth with glowing embers on the far wall beneath decorative tapestries

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a magnificent gothic dining hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Long wooden tables fill the center where numerous figures are seated dining, while a massive stone pillar dominates the right foreground. Tall arched windows on the right reveal the night sky, and a glowing fireplace sits on the far left wall beneath hanging tapestries.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, immersive gaze across a grand gothic dining hall bathed in the ethereal glow of floating candlelight. It begins with a wide view of the magnificent space, where long wooden tables filled with dining figures stretch toward the horizon. The perspective is framed by a massive stone pillar dominating the right foreground, while the eye is drawn toward the far left wall where a glowing fireplace flickers beneath heavy hanging tapestries. Finally, the scene opens up toward the right, revealing tall arched windows that frame a deep, starry night sky.
